title: rourea calophylloides
intro: Rourea calophylloides, also known as the Calophylloide, is a plant species belonging to the family Connaraceae, native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include the treatment of fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
